creator: zab@zltech.eu
text:
Created attachment 240680
update to 2.25.6

Update databases/mantis to version 2.25.6.
(This is a security and maintenance release.)

CHECK/QA:
- update: from 2.25.5 (postgres+php80) to 2.25.6 (postgres+php81):
core functions seem OK, no changes seen in user flows
- DB schema: unchanged
- new install: core functions work well
- poudriere: OK (12.4R, 13.1R, 14C; with/without my,pg,plugins in all combinations)
- portlint: no new WARNs/ERRs

VuXML entry in a separate PR: #270039
